block_01: There is no “one strategy fits all” when it comes to trading. However, some approaches are a lot more popular than others. Because of their simplicity for understanding and clear mechanics, they are easy to follow and execute.
block_02: In our review of the 3 most popular approaches we explain how the strategy works, cover the pros and cons and reveal what type of analysis is normally used for each of them. And if you are unsure of which one is better for you, simply try them all on your Practice balance!
block_03: Read on to find out about the 3 popular Forex strategies.
